# Agent Instructions

## Project goal
- Build and operate the Wozniak-Bau website with frontend and backend support.
- First milestone: host via GitHub Actions and GitHub Pages (or equivalent).
- Later milestone: move to server hosting with automated deploys.

## Current repo state
- Design assets only; no codebase yet.
- Ask before scaffolding or adding tooling.

## How to work
- Act as lead developer: propose a small plan, confirm decisions, then implement.
- Keep changes clean and reviewable; avoid destructive git commands.
- Use ASCII in source files unless non-ASCII already exists.

## Defaults (confirm before changing)
- Select a web stack only after user approval.
- Use GitHub Actions for build and deploy; prefer GitHub Pages for static hosting.
- For backend needs, suggest a separate service and a deploy target.

## Key assets
- [LOGO.pdf](../LOGO.pdf)
- [Visitenkarte Vorderseite.pdf](../Visitenkarte%20Vorderseite.pdf)
- [Visitenkarte Rueckseite.pdf](../Visitenkarte%20Rueckseite.pdf)
